Paragraph

Note that
\begin{equation} \{\bx: f \text{ discontinuous at } \bx\}= \cup_{k\in \bbN} \{\by: \osc(f)(\by)\ge \frac 1k\},\tag{5.2.1} \end{equation}
namely, \(\{\bx: f \text{ discontinuous at } \bx\}\) is a countable union of of the closed sets \(\{\by: \osc(f)(\by)\ge \frac 1k\}\text{.}\)
in-context
